user_message: Can you extract the account health from this exec meeting notes for Parnell Aerospace? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 15:05 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace account health

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 12:04 EST
Subject: Re: Re: account health Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for account health. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-09 08:04 EST
Subject: URGENT: account health Issue at Parnell Aerospace

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Parnell Aerospace: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF37-K failure mode (Strict read-only when fast MSX risk-flag update would matter)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence
